verdict: A solid Easy chart with good rhythmic structure, severely held back by a physically impossible three-panel jump-and-hold combination at 127.78 seconds.

issues.problem: The chart requires a JUMP LR while HOLD U is still active (which doesn't end until 128.014). This requires three feet and is physically impossible to perform on a standard dance pad.
The step sequence (JUMP LR -> D -> U -> L) repeats identically four times in a row, which feels uninspired and overly repetitive even for an Easy chart.
